front: What is the role of copper-free click chemistry in live-cell imaging?
back: Tetrazine-trans-cyclooctene (Tz-TCO) ligation is the fastest copper-free click reaction (k2 ~10^6 M^-1 s^-1). IEDDA (inverse electron demand) mechanism. Used for real-time cell labeling, pretargeted imaging, and in vivo bioconjugation.
